hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then case "$FILE" in *.py) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'

hooks.prompt: Check if the last task involved code changes. If so, verify: 1) Were tests run or clearly explained? 2) Were docs updated if behavior changed? 3) Were any risky issues left unresolved? If verification is missing, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "Please run the relevant tests and update the related docs before finishing."}. Otherwise respond with {"ok": true}.

hooks.command: echo "Reminder: Read CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md for project context. Work on a feature branch, not main/master. Run tests and update docs before committing."
